prompt:
Scene:
A square web-launch still for a transparent desktop speaker system, presented as a polished premium landing page. The layout feels airy and editorial, with an off-white background that grades into faint ice gray, minimal grid lines, and a calm daylight tone. The composition should suggest stacked website sections inside one frame: a hero band at the top, a storytelling middle section, and compact feature tiles below. Everything is aligned, spacious, and highly intentional.

Subject:
Feature a pair of transparent acrylic speakers with visible internal drivers, aluminum knobs, and smoked glass edges. One speaker stands upright as the main hero object; the second sits slightly behind it for depth. Construct the surrounding landing-page layout from abstract headline blocks, specification ribbons, icon-like markers, and modular content cards that imply acoustic tuning, transparent construction, and room presence. Include one close-up crop of the circular driver housing and one narrow band that suggests a lifestyle scene without showing a full room.

Important details:
This should feel like a launch page for a design-forward audio brand. Transparency, edge highlights, screws, driver cones, and acrylic thickness must be rendered credibly. The page hierarchy should have a strong beat: hero, material story, internal detail, feature row, CTA. Keep the system elegant and premium rather than playful. Use negative space, thin dividers, and quiet contrast to make the composition readable at a glance.

Use case:
Premium Product Landing Page single study 2/9, testing transparent hardware presentation and story-module rhythm in one premium web frame.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no browser chrome, no crowded furniture scene, no random equalizer graphics, no exaggerated RGB lighting, no warped acrylic geometry, no cheap retail packaging.
title: Transparent Speaker Story
description: A premium landing-page still presenting transparent desktop speakers through hero photography and material-story sections.

generation.runner_notes: Independent premium landing-page study focused on transparent speaker storytelling modules.

en.title: Transparent Speaker Story

alt.en: A transparent speaker launch page with acrylic hardware, material close-ups, and clean feature cards.
alt.zh-CN: 一张透明音箱发布页静帧，展示亚克力机身、细节特写和干净的功能模块。
